Combat.name: Strike to Injure
Combat.description: The warrior adds +1 to all injury rolls in hand-to-hand combat.

Combat.name: Combat Master
Combat.description: The warrior can fight multiple opponents. If in base contact with more than one enemy, he gains +1 Attack.

Combat.name: Dodge
Combat.description: The warrior is adept at dodging blows. He gains a 5+ unmodifiable save against any hits in hand-to-hand combat.

Combat.name: Hard to Kill
Combat.description: The warrior is exceptionally tough. When rolling on the Injury table, subtract 1 from the result (minimum 1).

Combat.name: Parry
Combat.description: The warrior is skilled with his weapon. If he is carrying a sword or buckler, he can parry on 4+ (instead of 5+ or 6+).

Combat.name: Hidden Agenda
Combat.description: The warrior is always looking for an opening. He may choose the first opponent to attack in multiple combat, regardless of Initiative.

Strength.name: Mighty Blow
Strength.description: The warrior adds +1 to his Strength in hand-to-hand combat.

Strength.name: Pit Fighter
Strength.description: The warrior is used to fighting in enclosed spaces. He gains +1 WS and +1 Attack when fighting inside buildings.

Strength.name: Resilient
Strength.description: The warrior is incredibly tough. Subtract 1 from the Strength of any hits against him (minimum S1).

Strength.name: Strongman
Strength.description: The warrior can use a double-handed weapon with no penalty to his Initiative.

Strength.name: Unstoppable Charge
Strength.description: The warrior gains +1 Strength on the turn he charges.

Strength.name: Greatest Strength
Strength.description: The warrior can carry and use any weapon, including massive Ogre weapons, without penalty.

Shooting.name: Eagle Eyes
Shooting.description: The warrior adds +6" to the range of any missile weapon he is using.

Shooting.name: Marksman
Shooting.description: The warrior adds +1 to his BS.

Shooting.name: Quick Shot
Shooting.description: The warrior can fire twice in the Shooting phase if he does not move.

Shooting.name: Pistolier
Shooting.description: The warrior can fire his pistols in every round of hand-to-hand combat.

Shooting.name: Hunter
Shooting.description: The warrior can fire even if he has moved or marched, provided he is using a bow, longbow, or elf bow.

Shooting.name: Trick Shooter
Shooting.description: The warrior ignores all penalties for cover when shooting.

Academic.name: Battle Tongue
Academic.description: The warrior's Leadership range is increased by +6".

Academic.name: Sorcery
Academic.description: The warrior adds +1 to his rolls to cast spells or prayers.

Academic.name: Streetwise
Academic.description: The warrior is skilled at finding rare items in the market. Add +2 to any rolls to find items.

Academic.name: Haggle
Academic.description: The warrior can negotiate 10% lower prices for any items bought (minimum reduction of 1gc).

Academic.name: Medic
Academic.description: The warrior can treat wounds. If a friendly model is OOA, roll k6: on 4+ they are treated as only Stunned.

Academic.name: Witch Lore
Academic.description: The warrior can identify magical items and gains +1 to dispel tests.

Speed.name: Acrobat
Speed.description: The warrior can jump or leap up to 4" vertically or horizontally without a test. He also ignores the -1 penalty for climbing.

Speed.name: Lightning Reflexes
Speed.description: If the warrior is charged, he can still attack first if his Initiative is higher than the charger's.

Speed.name: Jump Up
Speed.description: The warrior can ignore the effects of being Knocked Down. He may stand up and act normally.

Speed.name: Sprint
Speed.description: The warrior can triple his movement instead of doubling it when running or charging.

Speed.name: Infiltrate
Speed.description: The warrior can be deployed anywhere on the board at the start of the game, as long as he is out of sight and at least 12" away from enemies.

Speed.name: Scale Walls
Speed.description: The warrior can climb vertical surfaces with no movement penalty and no test required.

Starting.name: Leader
Starting.description: Models within 6” of him can use his Ld value for Ld tests

Starting.name: Leader (12")
Starting.description: Models within 12” of him can use his Ld value for Ld tests (instead of the usual 6”)

Starting.name: Mercenary
Starting.description: In a warband led by him, Human Mercenary models become 0-5

Starting.name: Burn the Witch!
Starting.description: The model feels Hatred towards all models using magic (but not prayers!), and all models in the Servants of Darkness warband

Starting.name: Religious Fanatic
Starting.description: In a warband led by him, Flagellant and Sister of Sigmar models become 0-3; he cannot hire a Wandering Wizard

Starting.name: Hard to Kill
Starting.description: Can only be OOA on a 6 instead of 5,6 (treat 3-5 as Stunned)

Starting.name: Hard Head
Starting.description: Dwarfs ignore the 'Concussion' rule of weapons hitting them

Starting.name: Armored
Starting.description: Dwarfs ignore the movement penalties of Heavy Armor and Shields

Starting.name: Conservative
Starting.description: The number of available Hero models in the warband decreases from 6 to 5, but in the vacated slot you can recruit a Pet; Dwarf Warrior models become 0-4

Starting.name: Wannabe Hero
Starting.description: When recruiting this hero, you can pay an extra 10gc and add 2 experience points to develop their WS or BS by 1 point.

Starting.name: Fanatical
Starting.description: Automatically passes all Ld tests. Can never become the warband leader, nor can you use him for Rout tests

Starting.name: Devotion to the Cause
Starting.description: The model feels Hatred towards all models of the Servants of Darkness warband

Starting.name: Hatred of Greenskins
Starting.description: The model feels Hatred towards all Greenskins

Starting.name: Death Wish
Starting.description: Automatically passes all Ld tests. Can never become the warband leader, nor can you use him for Rout tests

Starting.name: Causes Fear
Starting.description: The model causes fear and is immune to it

Starting.name: Immune to Psychology
Starting.description: The model never needs to take Ld tests

Starting.name: Immune to Poisons
Starting.description: No poisons work on this model

Starting.name: No Pain
Starting.description: The model cannot be stunned – treat all Stunned results as Knocked Down

Starting.name: Suspicious
Starting.description: Can never become the warband leader, nor can you use him for Rout tests

Starting.name: Fear
Starting.description: The model causes fear and is immune to it

Starting.name: Large Target
Starting.description: The model counts as a large target for shooting

Starting.name: Hatred of Dark Elves
Starting.description: Feels Hatred towards Dark Elf models

Starting.name: Excellent Sight
Starting.description: Doubles the range of detection for Hidden enemies

Starting.name: Bear Hug
Starting.description: Instead of normal attacks, roll k6 + Strength; higher result deals an automatic wound with no armor

Starting.name: Night Nobility
Starting.description: In a warband led by him, Minion models become 0-5

Starting.name: Perfect Assassin
Starting.description: The model has an additional -1 to enemy Armor (both in close combat and shooting)

Starting.name: Rat King
Starting.description: In a warband led by him, Black Rat models become 0-4

Starting.name: Da Boss
Starting.description: In a warband led by him, Orc and Goblin models become 0-5

Starting.name: Chaos Champion
Starting.description: In a warband led by him, Gladiator (Chaos Marauder) models become 0-5

Starting.name: Mutations
Starting.description: The model must start the game with one or more mutations

Starting.name: Insane
Starting.description: Automatically passes all Ld tests. Can never become the warband leader, nor can you use him for Rout tests

Starting.name: Hatred of Dwarfs
Starting.description: The model feels Hatred towards all Dwarfs

Starting.name: Hatred of Elf Rangers
Starting.description: Feels Hatred towards Elf Ranger models

Starting.name: Bestial
Starting.description: Automatically passes all Ld tests. Can never become the warband leader, nor can you use him for Rout tests

Starting.name: Stupidity
Starting.description: The model is subject to Stupidity rules

Starting.name: Armed
Starting.description: Treat as if possessing two axes or a two-handed axe, depending on model appearance

Starting.name: Bloodlust
Starting.description: If the model defeats all opponents in close combat, on 4+ it falls into Frenzy

Starting.name: Regeneration
Starting.description: On 4+ the wound is ignored (not fire). A fallen troll after the skirmish never rolls for Serious Injury.

Starting.name: Always Hungry
Starting.description: The troll has a maintenance cost of 15 gc after each battle (or eating any model).

Starting.name: Vomit
Starting.description: Instead of normal attacks, one automatic hit with Strength 5 and no Armor Rolls

Starting.name: Movement
Starting.description: Moves 2k6 in a chosen direction. If it reaches an enemy, it counts as charging.

Starting.name: Keeper
Starting.description: If there is no Goblin within 6” at the start of the Movement Phase, it moves randomly.

Starting.name: Daemon Soul
Starting.description: 4+ save against spells or prayers

Starting.name: Great Claw
Starting.description: Extra attack with +1 Strength. Cannot hold anything in that hand.

Starting.name: Cloven Hooves
Starting.description: Model receives +1 Speed

Starting.name: Tentacle
Starting.description: Can grab opponent's weapon. Opponent loses 1 attack (maximum 1 per round).

Starting.name: Black Blood
Starting.description: If the model loses a wound in close combat, everyone in contact receives a Strength 3 hit (no criticals).

Starting.name: Spikes
Starting.description: Every model in contact receives a Strength 1 hit at the start of each combat phase.

Starting.name: Scorpion Tail
Starting.description: Tail adding one Attack with Strength 5 (S2 if target is immune to poison).

Starting.name: Extra Arm
Starting.description: Can use an extra weapon/shield/buckler (+1 Attack).

Starting.name: Hideous
Starting.description: The model causes Fear

Starting.name: Tiny Horns
Starting.description: No effect, but they look nice

Starting.name: Tail Fight
Starting.description: The model can use its tail to hold an extra shield, dagger, or sword (+1 Attack).

Starting.name: Wall Runner
Starting.description: The model can climb without taking Climbing tests.

Starting.name: Tuff 'Ed
Starting.description: The model can avoid Stun on 3+ and convert it to Knocked Down (2+ if wearing a helmet).

Starting.name: WAAA!
Starting.description: The model can add k3 inches to its charge range

Starting.name: Big Un
Starting.description: Can use a two-handed weapon one-handed (it gains the 'Main' trait)

Starting.name: Serious Threats
Starting.description: Leaders only. Can reroll failed Rout tests.

Starting.name: Sign of Sigmar
Starting.description: Possessed and Undead lose their first attack in close combat against this model (min 1) in the first round.

Starting.name: Total Determination
Starting.description: May reroll all failed Rout tests.

Starting.name: Exceptionally Tough
Starting.description: Model may reroll the first die of a Serious Injury roll, but must accept the second result even if worse.

Starting.name: Truly Hardy
Starting.description: Model is knocked down on 1-3, stunned on 4-5 and OOA on 6.

Starting.name: Hard Skull
Starting.description: Model avoids Stun on 3+ and converts it to Knocked Down (2+ if wearing a helmet).

Starting.name: Cruel Charge
Starting.description: Model can double its base attacks when charging (not from extra weapon), but they have -1 to hit.

Starting.name: Monster Slayer
Starting.description: Regardless of Strength, the Slayer wounds on 4+ unless normal strikes allow better.

Starting.name: Berserker
Starting.description: Model has +1 to hit in close combat on the turn it charges.

Starting.name: Blood Oath
Starting.description: Automatically passes its first Rout test in the game.

Starting.name: Infiltration
Starting.description: Model can be deployed anywhere on the table out of sight and more than 12 inches from enemies.
